name: Corn Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salt, Masa Harina, and shortening; mix well.
2. Gradually add water while mixing until a dough forms.
3. If needed, adjust consistency by adding more water.
4. Divide the dough into 10 to 12 balls.
5. Roll each ball between two sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap into a six-inch circle.
6. Heat a griddle over medium-high heat and lightly oil it.
7. Place one dough ball onto the hot griddle, cover with waxed paper or plastic wrap, and press down firmly.
8. Cook for about 20 to 30 seconds on the first side, then turn and cook an additional 20 to 30 seconds on the second side.
9. Remove from heat and repeat with remaining tortillas.
10. Store any unused tortillas in a warm place until ready to serve.
